why_not_clean_pass: External finalization receipt still contains PENDING_VERIFICATION_FOR_CONTAINING_COMMIT for the containing commit.
Hard red-team keeps CAP_STAGE1_WITH_WARNINGS_ONLY, CAP_NO_IDE_VISUAL_RELEASE_YET, CAP_NO_WARP_RUNTIME.
This review used GitHub/raw evidence, not local independent replay/clone in the reviewer environment.
IDE workbench artifacts are candidate/design contracts only; no IDE runtime/API/browser automation was implemented.
accepted_progress: BLOCK_SPINE foundation added as candidate structure.
Eight organ block passports and compact read-first/context digest files added.
Task context pack builder and context bloat detector prototypes added and executed.
Context pack reports 50 items, 34 mandatory, 16 optional, estimated 40448 chars, no duplicate read-first or forbidden pattern issues.
Owner-question pass and evidence boundary receipts were added at final reviewed head.
Scope exclusions are explicit: no IDE runtime, no external API integration, no browser automation runtime, no second micro-pilot execution.
inquisitor.pre_next_required_gate: Accept candidate block-spine contracts or run small external-finalization follow-up if Owner wants closure-cap removed before pilot.

top_3_blockers.title: Clean PASS remains blocked by explicit caps
top_3_blockers.detail: Hard red-team keeps CAP_STAGE1_WITH_WARNINGS_ONLY, CAP_NO_IDE_VISUAL_RELEASE_YET and CAP_NO_WARP_RUNTIME; verdict remains BLOCK_SPINE_CONTEXT_OPTIMIZATION_PASS_WITH_WARNINGS.

top_3_blockers.title: External finalization follow-up semantics still not fully closed
top_3_blockers.detail: 64b0146 avoids the self-head paradox by using external delivery fields, but leaves CAP_EXTERNAL_FINALIZATION_RECEIPT_MISSING_OR_NEEDS_FOLLOWUP. cda2203 adds boundary/question pass receipts, not an explicit external_delivery_head closure for cda itself.

top_3_blockers.title: Main implementation is broad and mostly scaffolding/focus layer, not runtime leverage
top_3_blockers.detail: 1a3d30a is a 99-file, +3964/-7 implementation. It adds useful Block Spine context tooling, but also IDE workbench candidate contracts and registered taskpack artifacts that must not be mistaken for runtime implementation.

positive_evidence: Block Spine standard and context-pack schema/template were added.
build_task_context_pack_v0_1.py and context_bloat_detector_v0_1.py exist as script-first tools.
Task context pack contains 34 mandatory context items, 16 optional items and estimated 40,448 characters.
Context bloat detector reports PASS: 50 total context items, duplicate_read_first_count=0, forbidden_pattern_count=0, blocking_issues=[].
All 8 organs received BLOCK compact digests and organ block passports.
Hard red-team confirms forbidden_scope_violations_detected=false and no IDE/API/browser automation runtime was started.
Final cda2203 adds EVIDENCE_BOUNDARY and IMPERIUM_QUESTION_PASS with owner_questions=[] and PASS_WITHOUT_ADDITIONAL_OWNER_QUESTION.

taskpack_decision.reason: The foundation is accepted with warnings, but runtime leverage is unproven. The next proof must consume a context pack and measure economy.
taskpack_decision.external_finalization_cap_strategy: Carry transparently into the micro-pilot. Do not spend a separate tiny task unless Owner explicitly requests it.
